entries.text: DET faces elimination against ORL. Desperation buys one game, not four — ORL closes it out tonight.
BOS up 3-1 and closing teams don't blink. Book it — BOS finishes the job.
OKC has the closeout look. PHX's season ends tonight, probably in the fourth quarter.
HOU faces elimination against LAL. Desperation buys one game, not four — LAL closes it out tonight.
Series knotted 1-1, DET at ORL. Game 3 is the momentum pivot — ORL protects home court and flips the series lead.
PHI gets its first home game of the series. Expect a loud start, a double-digit lead, and a PHI W.
